Week 3: Testing, Deployment, and Going to Production

Next week we cover everything you need to ship your voice AI to real users - testing strategies, deployment patterns, and production monitoring.

This is part of our ongoing series helping developers build with voice AI.

Key takeaways:
• Practical code examples you can use today
• Real-world patterns from production systems
• Best practices from the Ferni team
